name: Medicall Chennai 2026
about: India's largest B2B medical equipment exhibition — 47th edition. 750+ exhibitors, 30,000+ visitors, 20+ countries. Features expo floor, Brainstorm Medicall seminars, and the Medicall Innovation Awards. Organised by Medexpert (promoted by Dr Manivannan S, MD of Kauvery Hospitals).

participation.name: Visitor Entry
participation.detail: Online pre-registration at medicall.in. Walk in with confirmation QR. Full expo access 10 AM–6 PM all 3 days.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Register now — you're already attending
participation.deadline: Register before Jul 22 to skip queues

participation.name: Brainstorm Medicall Seminar (Delegate Pass)
participation.detail: Paid delegate passes for hospital management seminars. AI in healthcare, hospital IT tracks. Delegate badge + expo access.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Book at least 1 session — AI/Hospital IT track is your audience

participation.name: Medicall Innovation Award
participation.detail: Open to healthcare IT companies and startups. Past winner in fertility: SpOvum Technologies (RoboICSI for fertility clinics) won Motivational Award. Fertiva Pro fits Category: Healthcare IT / Hospital Management Software.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ APPLY — fertility-tech SaaS has won here before

participation.name: Exhibitor Stall
participation.detail: Minimum 9 sqm shell scheme. Stall space nearly sold out — sold-out warning active on site. Healthcare IT Pavilion is the right category.
participation.verdictLabel: ⚠ Stalls nearly sold out — call +91 7305 789 789 immediately

reasons: Already committed — Medverse Innovation Award notification on Jul 25.
Your lanyard + QR code are ready — passive lead generation across 3 days.
Brainstorm Medicall AI/hospital-IT seminar = room full of hospital decision-makers.
Medicall Innovation Award: fertility-tech SaaS fits. Prior winner SpOvum was a fertility startup.
Post-award press release trigger — win or shortlist unlocks your 8-outlet PR campaign.
note: 💡 Action: Register visitor pass at medicall.in. Apply for Innovation Award at medicall.in/innovation.php before July 20. Book Brainstorm seminar same page.

name: Medverse Awards 2026
about: Medverse 2026 Healthcare Excellence Awards — 27 categories across Individual Excellence, Social Impact, Institutional Excellence, and Healthcare Startups. Nominations open July 15, close August 31. Shortlist announced September 15. Ceremony at Medverse 2026 on September 27.

participation.name: Category 21 — Outstanding Healthcare Startup of the Year
participation.detail: For healthcare startups making significant impact. Fertiva Pro qualifies as a B2B IVF clinic management SaaS with documented features and compliance stack.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Apply — this is the obvious category for Fertiva Pro

participation.name: Category 22 — Most Innovative HealthTech Startup
participation.detail: Fertiva Pro's 12 AI features, 22-language voice transcription, and DPDP compliance make this a strong fit. You can nominate in 2 categories.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Apply as second category — same ₹1,000 fee covers 2 categories

participation.name: Category 06 — Healthcare Entrepreneur of the Year
participation.detail: For the founder (Muthu). Your origin story (fertility patient → founder) + solo build of ICMR-compliant SaaS is compelling.
participation.verdictLabel: ⚠ Consider as 3rd category — adds credibility for deal conversations

reasons: ₹1,000 for two categories is effectively free credibility if shortlisted.
Shortlist announcement Sep 15 = PR trigger for a second wave of press releases before Fertivision.
Ceremony is at Medverse Expo Sep 26–27 — you'll be exhibiting anyway.
note: 💡 Action: Nominations open July 15 at medverse.co.in/medverse-awards-2026-nominations. Apply Day 1.

name: ISAR INSPIRE Fertility Conclave
about: ISAR's mid-year fertility conclave for IVF specialists, embryologists, and reproductive medicine professionals. ISAR has 7,500+ active members — India's premier ART professional network. Conclave = smaller, curated format. Back-to-back with Medicall — same Chennai trip.

participation.name: Delegate (Attendee) Registration
participation.detail: Standard conference delegate registration. Includes all scientific sessions, networking lunches, and workshop access. Check isarindia.net for exact fee.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Register as delegate — every attendee is a potential client

participation.name: Vendor / Industry Exhibit
participation.detail: Industry exhibit table or kiosk inside the conclave venue. Direct access to 200–500 IVF doctors and embryologists. Contact ISAR organising committee via isarindia.net.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Strongly recommend — this is your bullseye audience
participation.deadline: Contact ISAR organising committee now — limited vendor slots

participation.name: Sponsorship (Session / Lunch / Bag)
participation.detail: Session co-sponsorship, conference bag insert, lunch sponsorship. Branded visibility with the IVF specialist audience.
participation.verdictLabel: ⚠ Consider if exhibitor slot unavailable

reasons: Highest IVF-specific ROI event on your calendar. Every attendee buys or recommends clinic management software.
One Chennai trip covers Medicall (Jul 24–26) + ISAR INSPIRE (Aug 1–2) — two #1 events back-to-back.
DPDP compliance + ICMR ART 2021 built-in = the exact pain points ISAR doctors need solved.
Coming off Medicall with award momentum gives you a credible narrative.
note: 💡 Action: Email ISAR at isarindia.net TODAY to request vendor/exhibitor slot for Aug 1–2.

name: IHFC–IIT Delhi MedTech Impact Call 2026
dateDisplay: Rolling applications | Demo Day Aug 2026 est.
about: IHFC (I-Hub Foundation for Cobotics at IIT Delhi) in collaboration with India Accelerator — MedTech startup funding and incubation program. Focus areas: Digital Health, AI-driven diagnostics, Telemedicine, and Health IT. Selected startups get co-investment up to ₹5 crore plus IIT Delhi mentorship and investor access.

participation.name: Startup Application
participation.detail: Open to registered Indian startups with MVP or validated prototype (TRL ≥ 4). Fertiva Pro has production-deployed AI features = TRL ≥ 5. Apply at ihfc.iitd.ac.in.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Apply — Fertiva Pro qualifies with live deployments
participation.deadline: Check ihfc.iitd.ac.in for current cohort deadline

reasons: ₹5 crore co-investment could fund Fertiva Pro's Pvt Ltd conversion and BD expansion.
IIT Delhi academic credibility improves investor and hospital group conversations.
Digital Health + AI track = exact fit with Fertiva Pro's 12 production-deployed AI features.
No equity demanded upfront — structured co-investment.
note: 💡 Action: Visit ihfc.iitd.ac.in immediately. If 2026 cohort is closed, get on 2027 waitlist.

name: India Health 2026 (Informa Markets)
about: 3rd edition of Informa Markets' flagship India healthcare expo — organisers of Arab Health (WHX Dubai). Expanded focus on medical manufacturing, digital health, and global partnerships. 300+ brands, 8,000+ stakeholders, 35+ conference sessions, 80+ speakers. Includes India HealthNext Awards and a B2B matchmaking app.

participation.name: Visitor Entry
participation.detail: Free visitor registration at indiahealth-exhibition.com. Full expo + conference session access.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Register free — combine with Delhi investor meetings

participation.name: India HealthNext Awards
participation.detail: Curated awards at India Health's evening networking event. Digital health and healthtech categories expected. Contact mehraj.waghu@informa.com for details.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Apply — digital health/AI track aligns perfectly

participation.name: Speaker / Session Presenter
participation.detail: 35+ sessions covering AI-led diagnostics and digital health. Submit speaker proposal on AI in IVF clinic management.
participation.verdictLabel: ⚠ Apply to speak — your 12 AI features story is unique content

participation.name: Exhibitor Stall
participation.detail: Premium Informa pricing. Not recommended at this stage — better to visit free and do parallel meetings.
participation.verdictLabel: ✗ Skip stall — premium cost for non-IVF general audience

reasons: Digital health and AI-led diagnostics conference track = your exact product story.
Healthcare IT decision-makers and hospital CXOs attend — multi-specialty hospital expansion targets.
Free visitor entry — low cost, high exposure.
India HealthNext Awards: digital health/AI category aligns with Fertiva Pro's 12 AI features.
note: 💡 Action: Register free at indiahealth-exhibition.com. Email mehraj.waghu@informa.com to explore speaker opportunity. Plan Delhi trip around Aug 21–25.

name: ESHRE Campus Workshop — Endometriosis
about: International workshop on Endometriosis organised jointly by ESHRE (European Society of Human Reproduction and Embryology), IFS, and ISAR. International-quality faculty, curated senior audience of embryologists and gynecologists. Workshop format = small room, deep access to senior IVF specialists.

participation.name: Delegate Registration
participation.detail: Paid delegate pass. Contact indianfertilitysociety.org for registration details. Workshop capacity is limited — register early.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Register — small room = high-quality conversations with senior buyers
participation.deadline: Check indianfertilitysociety.org for exact dates and fees

participation.name: Industry Partner / Sponsor
participation.detail: Industry sponsorship for ESHRE campus events. Workshop bag insert or session co-sponsorship gets brand in front of 50–150 senior specialists.
participation.verdictLabel: ⚠ Consider if budget allows — ESHRE badge gives international credibility

reasons: ESHRE + IFS + ISAR = international stamp on an intimate Indian event. Highest signal attendees.
Endometriosis management is a documented clinical workflow in Fertiva Pro.
Post-ISAR INSPIRE (Aug) — attendees recognise you from last month. Relationship deepens.
Workshop format: no expo floor noise, real conversations about clinical software needs.
note: 💡 Action: Check indianfertilitysociety.org for venue and registration details when published. Mark calendar now.

name: Medverse Hospital Growth Expo 2026
about: Second edition of South India's most actionable healthcare business summit. 2025 had 5,000+ visitors, 120+ stalls, 3,000+ doctors, and 1,430+ leads generated. 2026 target: 8,000+ audience, 200+ stalls, 50+ knowledge sessions. Medverse Award ceremony also on Sep 27.

participation.name: Free Visitor / Delegate Pass
participation.detail: Register at medverse.co.in. Open to doctors, hospital owners, and healthcare professionals.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Register as visitor — minimum commitment, maximum networking

participation.name: Exhibitor Stall
participation.detail: Book via Zoho form at medverse.co.in. 2025 had 120+ stalls. 2026 targets 200+. Direct access to hospital buyers, clinic owners, and procurement heads.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Book a stall — home-ground event, Tamil Nadu IVF clinic buyers
participation.deadline: Book stall now — fills up early. Contact: +91 95006 96461

participation.name: Startup Pitch Stage
participation.detail: Startups pitch live to investors, hospital chains, and industry buyers. Doctor + VC panel validation. 2025 had 100 medical startup pitches.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Apply for pitch slot — live funding/deal conversation opportunity
participation.deadline: Contact inquiry@medverse.co.in to apply for pitch slot

participation.name: Sponsorship
participation.detail: Brand exposure to 8,000+ attendees. Google Sponsor form available on Medverse website.
participation.verdictLabel: ⚠ Consider if budget allows after stall booking

reasons: Medverse Award ceremony is Sep 27 — you need to be there if shortlisted.
Tamil Nadu hospital owners = your primary customer segment.
Startup pitch stage gives you live deal conversations with investors and hospital chains.
2025 generated 1,430+ leads for exhibitors — strong ROI for B2B SaaS.
Home ground advantage: Salem is nearby Coimbatore.
note: 💡 Action: Book stall via medverse.co.in NOW — stalls fill up. Apply for startup pitch slot via inquiry@medverse.co.in.

name: India Med Expo — Bengaluru
about: Premier B2B medical exhibition connecting hospital owners, doctors, distributors, and procurement heads. Healthcare IT is an explicit product category. Bengaluru = Karnataka market beyond Tamil Nadu. Good concurrent with Medverse Sep trip.

participation.name: Free Visitor
participation.detail: Pre-register at indiamedexpo.com. Attend as industry visitor, collect contacts, schedule follow-up demos.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Visit — plan alongside Medverse Expo (Sep 26) for combined South India trip

participation.name: Exhibitor Stall
participation.detail: Minimum 9 sqm shell scheme. Healthcare IT category relevant but audience is more general hospital supply buyers.
participation.verdictLabel: ⚠ Only if budget allows after Medverse

reasons: Bengaluru has dense private IVF clinic ecosystem — high-value adjacent market.
Sep 5–7 Bengaluru + Sep 26–27 Salem = one productive South India trip covering two events.
Attend as visitor, schedule parallel IVF clinic demos the same trip.
note: 💡 Action: Combine with Bengaluru IVF clinic outreach. Pre-book 5–6 direct clinic meetings around Sep 5–7 alongside the expo visit.

name: National Startup Awards (NSA) 5.0
about: Government of India's DPIIT-run National Startup Awards. ₹10 lakh cash prize per winning category. Winners get investor connect, government pilot support, and priority for national/international startup events. Health-tech category specifically honors startups improving healthcare outcomes.
keyFacts: Winners get investor access + government connect

participation.name: HealthTech Category Application
participation.detail: Requires DPIIT recognition (free process at startupindia.gov.in). NSA 5.0 applications appear closed. Apply for DPIIT recognition now to be ready for NSA 6.0.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Get DPIIT recognition now — unlocks NSA + government scheme eligibility
participation.deadline: NSA 5.0 closed. Watch for NSA 6.0 in early 2027.

reasons: ₹10L prize + investor connect + government pilot = non-dilutive capital + enterprise credibility.
DPIIT recognition itself adds credibility for ABDM/ABHA integration conversations.
NSA winners get priority for DPIIT's national/international startup event representation.
note: 💡 Action: Apply for DPIIT recognition NOW at startupindia.gov.in — it's free and takes 2–4 weeks. Unlocks NSA + multiple government schemes.

name: Global Digital Health Summit (GDHS) 2026
about: World's most influential summit on AI implementation in healthcare. Theme: 'AI in Action'. 6,645 attendees at previous edition, 97.6% rated 'Outstanding'. Speakers include global healthcare CXOs, hospital administrators, and AI experts. Includes Expo and Innovation Awards.

participation.name: Delegate Pass
participation.detail: Full 2-day access to summit, expo, and awards. Check current pricing at globalsummit.health.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Attend — AI in healthcare is your entire product story
participation.deadline: Check globalsummit.health for current pricing phase

participation.name: GDHS Innovation Awards
participation.detail: Innovation awards are a GDHS fixture. Digital health, AI in diagnostics, and health IT categories. Apply via globalsummit.health.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Apply for Innovation Award — AI IVF SaaS is highly differentiated
participation.deadline: Check globalsummit.health for award submission deadline

participation.name: Speaker / Presenter
participation.detail: Global summit actively seeks AI implementation case studies. Your 22-language voice transcription + DPDP-compliant AI clinical scribe is unique material.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Submit speaker proposal — 'AI in IVF clinic management' is a unique slot

reasons: 'AI in Action' theme is Fertiva Pro's product story in 3 words.
By November you have Medicall + ISAR + Medverse + GDHS Awards on your credential stack.
Hospital administrators here evaluate AI solutions — your multi-specialty hospital expansion targets.
Speaking slot on AI in IVF = national thought leadership positioning.
note: 💡 Action: Email office@globalsummit.health now with a speaker abstract on 'AI in IVF Clinic Management — DPDP-compliant, 22-language'. Secure delegate ticket.

name: Fertivision 2026 — IFS Annual Conference
about: 22nd Annual Conference of the Indian Fertility Society. Theme: 'Practice with Precision'. Covers precision medicine, AI in reproductive care, and the latest ART advancements. IFS has 1,000+ fertility specialists nationally. Dedicated exhibition floor alongside scientific sessions.

participation.name: Non-Member Delegate
participation.detail: Open to industry professionals. Contact fertivision2026.com for registration. Scientific sessions + exhibition access.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Register as industry delegate

participation.name: Industry Exhibitor Stall
participation.detail: Exhibition floor at IFS national conference. Direct access to 500–1,000 IVF specialists. Stalls fill fast — book by Oct.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Book stall — national IVF audience, perfect year-end push
participation.deadline: Book by Oct 2026 — email via fertivision2026.com

participation.name: IFS Innovation Award
participation.detail: IFS runs achievement and innovation awards at Fertivision. Check indianfertilitysociety.org for Fertivision 2026 award categories.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Apply for any innovation / digital health award category

reasons: 'Practice with Precision' theme = Fertiva Pro's exact value proposition in 3 words.
By December, you'll have 5 months of post-Medicall traction and case studies.
Exhibition floor puts you directly in front of the national IVF specialist community.
East India market exposure — Kolkata edition opens Bengal, Odisha, and North-East clinics.
note: 💡 Action: Visit fertivision2026.com now to register and enquire about exhibitor packages. Budget ₹80K–1.5L for stall + travel. One signed client covers the full cost.

name: FOGSI Tamil Nadu Chapter CMEs
about: FOGSI (Federation of Obstetric and Gynaecological Societies of India) Tamil Nadu and IFS South Tamil Nadu chapters run monthly CME events. 47,000+ OBGyn members nationally. CMEs gather 30–150 specialists in a room, trust-based format. OBGyns are Fertiva Pro's primary referral channel.

participation.name: CME Sponsorship
participation.detail: Sponsor a monthly CME to get 5–10 min product mention or demo slot. Contact IFS South Tamil Nadu or FOGSI TN chapter secretary.
participation.verdictLabel: ✓ Sponsor 2–3 per quarter — highest referral ROI per rupee spent
participation.deadline: Ongoing — contact IFS/FOGSI TN chapter directly

reasons: OBGyns refer patients to IVF clinics — strongest referral channel for Fertiva Pro's end-users.
₹10–25K per CME sponsorship gets you in front of 30–150 specialists.
Tamil Nadu chapters = home ground, no significant travel cost.
note: 💡 Action: Email IFS South TN chapter and FOGSI TN chapter secretary. Request sponsor slot for Aug/Sep CME. Budget ₹60K for 3 events across Q3.
